# Ask Arthur
> AI-powered scam detection platform for Australia

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://askarthur.au/): Free AI scam checker — paste suspicious messages for instant analysis
- [About](https://askarthur.au/about): About Ask Arthur, mission, and team
- [Pricing](https://askarthur.au/pricing): API pricing tiers (Free, Pro, Enterprise)
- [Chrome Extension](https://askarthur.au/extension): Browser extension for Facebook scam ad detection

## Blog
- [Blog](https://askarthur.au/blog): Scam alerts, protection guides, compliance, and intelligence reports
- [Scam Alerts](https://askarthur.au/blog/category/scam-alerts): Weekly threat intelligence from real scams
- [Protection Guides](https://askarthur.au/blog/category/guides): Step-by-step scam protection guides
- [Compliance](https://askarthur.au/blog/category/compliance): SPF Act compliance for regulated entities
- [Intelligence](https://askarthur.au/blog/category/intelligence): Data-driven scam trend reports
- [Product Updates](https://askarthur.au/blog/category/product): Features and platform updates

## Tools
- [Scam Checker](https://askarthur.au/): Paste text, URLs, or images for AI analysis
- [Website Audit](https://askarthur.au/audit): Security header and TLS scanner
- [Persona Check](https://askarthur.au/persona-check): Verify if online profiles are legitimate
- [Security Scanner](https://askarthur.au/health): Scan websites, extensions, MCP servers, AI skills
- [Feed](https://askarthur.au/scam-feed): Public scam intelligence feed

## API Documentation
- [API Docs](https://askarthur.au/api/docs): B2B Threat Intelligence API (OpenAPI 3.0)

## Legal
- [Privacy Policy](https://askarthur.au/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://askarthur.au/terms)
